work_completed.details: Merged 4 commits (pre-merge blockers, sidebar nav, docusign optimization) into main with conflict resolution in ChatPanel.tsx
Added quick link /dashboard/ai in Visão Geral section + new 'IA & Análises' section with 4 role-scoped persona links (admin, financial, commercial, operational)
Root cause: AI_COPILOT_ENABLED not set in Vercel environment. Diagnosed via DevTools. Also optimized output styling (prose-xs, reduced spacing/margins) for compact display.

remaining_work.task: Verify Vercel env vars are set
remaining_work.details: Resolved for current production runtime on Swarm: /opt/carreirahub/.env has AI_COPILOT_ENABLED=true, AI_PERSONAS_ENABLED=true, NEXT_PUBLIC_AI_PERSONAS_ENABLED=true, AI_MODEL_DEFAULT=gpt-5.2-chat-latest, and OPENAI_API_KEY present
Run authenticated checklist on https://app.carreirausa.com using docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-15-ai-personas-smoke.md (4 personas × hubs, cache behavior, RBAC, output quality)

blockers.description: AI chat previously returned 503 'AI copilot desativado' on production
blockers.root_cause: Production env was stale; current canonical runtime is Swarm at app.carreirausa.com, not Vercel
blockers.solution: Set AI_COPILOT_ENABLED=true and AI_PERSONAS_ENABLED=true in /opt/carreirahub/.env and restarted carreirahub_hub
blockers.workaround: No workaround needed; unauthenticated smoke now redirects to /auth/signin instead of 503

human_actions_pending.context: Runtime env is configured on Swarm at /opt/carreirahub/.env; verify persona behavior with a logged-in internal user on https://app.carreirausa.com

human_actions_pending.action: Do not use the legacy Vercel URL for validation
human_actions_pending.context: Canonical production URL is https://app.carreirausa.com on the carreirausa Swarm host
Verify all 4 personas work, cache behavior, RBAC, output quality

decisions.decision: Use subagent-driven development for AI Personas implementation
decisions.rationale: Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review (spec compliance + code quality) for high-quality, fast iteration

decisions.decision: Pragmatic scope: personas as chat presets, defer execution-style assistants to V2
decisions.rationale: Ship faster, simpler system; advanced features can be added later

decisions.decision: Defer thundering herd race condition mitigation to V1.1
decisions.rationale: Low risk (1 org, max 2-3 concurrent clicks); adding Postgres advisory locks adds complexity; TODO comment in code for future

decisions.decision: Optimize AI output styling (prose-xs, compact spacing)
decisions.rationale: Original spacing (prose-sm, mt-6, mb-3, leading-7) made output too verbose; reduced to prose-xs, mt-2, mb-1, leading-5 for readability

git_state.last_commit: bba364f - style(ai): reduce output spacing and font size for compact display

context_notes: AI Personas feature is code-complete and merged to main. Current production runs on Swarm at https://app.carreirausa.com. /opt/carreirahub/.env has AI_COPILOT_ENABLED=true, AI_PERSONAS_ENABLED=true, NEXT_PUBLIC_AI_PERSONAS_ENABLED=true, AI_MODEL_DEFAULT=gpt-5.2-chat-latest, and OPENAI_API_KEY present. Service carreirahub_hub was restarted and converged. Health check passed. Unauthenticated AI route smoke returns 307 /auth/signin instead of 503.
next_action: Run authenticated smoke test matrix on https://app.carreirausa.com to verify all 4 personas work, cache behavior, RBAC, and output quality.
